inputs.label: Weight Lifted
inputs.businessContext: The total weight used in the exercise, including barbell if applicable

businessContext_i18n.en: The total weight used in the exercise, including barbell if applicable
businessContext_i18n.tr: Egzersizde kullanılan toplam ağırlık (varsa halter dahil)
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtgewicht der Übung, inkl. Langhantel falls zutreffend
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids total utilisé dans l'exercice, incluant la barre si applicable

inputs.label: Repetitions
inputs.businessContext: Number of repetitions completed with the given weight

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of repetitions completed with the given weight
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Wiederholungen mit dem gegebenen Gewicht
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de répétitions effectuées avec le poids donné

inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Lifter's body weight for relative strength calculation

businessContext_i18n.en: Lifter's body weight for relative strength calculation
businessContext_i18n.tr: Göreceli kuvvet hesaplaması için sporcunun vücut ağırlığı
businessContext_i18n.de: Körpergewicht des Sportlers für relative Kraftberechnung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids corporel du sportif pour le calcul de la force relative

inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Lifter's age (optional, for future age-adjusted standards)

businessContext_i18n.en: Lifter's age (optional, for future age-adjusted standards)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sporcunun yaşı (isteğe bağlı, gelecekteki yaşa göre ayarlanmış standartlar için)
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Sportlers (optional, für zukünftige altersangepasste Standards)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge du sportif (optionnel, pour les normes ajustées à l'âge)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
